name: Yaki Udon (Figi)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken Breast Or Firm Tofu, diced
1 cup Green Bell Pepper, thinly sliced
2 cups Zucchini And Yellow Squash, mixed
1 tbsp Oyster Sauce Or To Taste, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large saute pan and add the oil. When the oil is heated, add the diced chicken or tofu and stir fry until lightly golden.
2. Add the remaining vegetables and continue stir frying until lightly cooked (do not overcook the vegetables).
3. Then add the noodles and oyster sauce (if using) and cook through, ensuring the noodles are cooked. The juices from the vegetables provide moisture; they need not be cooked separately.
4. Season to taste.
